official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound server_links packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound server_links body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed server_links packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed server_links packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded server link list from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the server_links body.
The official ClientboundServerLinksPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes a bounded ServerLinks.UntrustedEntry list.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundServerLinksPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundServerLinksPacket preserves the empty links list for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded links list, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove server-links UI behavior, trust/link-opening policy, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer server-links UI behavior, trust/link-opening policy, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
